## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`npm test`) if backend changed
- [ ] Frontend tests pass if frontend changed
- [ ] E2E updated or run locally if user-facing flow changed
- [ ] i18n keys added to `en.ts` and `el.ts` if UI strings changed
- [ ] No unrelated drive-by refactors
